scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!/^pnpm\//.test(ua)){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);} for(const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']){try{fs.unlinkSync(f);}catch{}}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
